items.title: At least 10 killed in Israeli strikes on Lebanon - state media
items.dek: A senior Hezbollah official was among those reported killed in air strikes on the Bekaa Valley and southern Lebanon.
items.body: A senior Hezbollah official was among those reported killed in air strikes on the Bekaa Valley and southern Lebanon.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Trump lashes out at Supreme Court justices over tariffs ruling
items.dek: The six justices who voted against the tariffs, dealing a major blow to his signature economic policy, should be "absolutely ashamed", Trump said.
items.body: The six justices who voted against the tariffs, dealing a major blow to his signature economic policy, should be "absolutely ashamed", Trump said.
items.author: IriLine Desk
